About

Description

Gerhard Richter is a German visual artist. Richter has produced abstract as well as photorealistic paintings, photographs and glass pieces. Wikipedia
Born: February 9, 1932 (age 94 years), Dresden, Germany
Periods: Contemporary art, Modern art, Photorealism, Realism, Conceptual art, Capitalist realism, Abstract art
Spouse: Sabine Moritz-Richter (m. 1995), Isa Genzken (m. 1982–1993)
Children: Ella Maria Richter, Betty Richter, Moritz Richter
Parents: Ernst Alfred Schönfelder, Hildegard Schönfelder
Known for: Painting
Education: Dresden Art Academy, Kunstakademie Düsseldorf
